context: The Soviet Union in 1975 was in the Brezhnev 'Era of Stagnation,' but estrada (popular entertainment) was vibrant. The annual Pesnya Goda festival was the premier showcase for Soviet pop. Alla Pugacheva's 'Arlekino' sold 14 million copies and launched her to superstardom. Songs were vetted for Communist Party compliance.

tracks.title: U Derevni Kryukovo (Near the Village of Kryukovo)
Dobry Vecher, Devchonochka (Good Evening, Little Girl)
